race.comment: DENMAN BANDIT (3) finished fourth two runs back at Dubbo then improved last time out to score by 1.1 lengths as favourite after being in contention on the corner over 900m at Wellington. Looks well placed so expect another big run. SORRENTO PALACE (2) was going well before a spell with two straight minor placings. Proven first-up performer back from a break of six months. Commendable record at this trip with a win and two minor placings and should prove tough to beat. EL BEATLE (5) ran a strong race last time out, finishing fourth and beaten only 2 lengths over 1000m at Port Macquarie after being in the firing line on the turn. Could be one at odds. GOLDEN VADER (6) finished sixth two runs back then did well last start but found one better over 1000m at this track, beaten only 0.9 lengths. Nicely placed to find winning ways.
